endpoints.name: GET /providers/Microsoft.AAD/operations
endpoints.description: Lists all the available Domain Services operations.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.

endpoints.name: List Domain Services in Subscription (GET Resources)
endpoints.description: The List Domain Services in Subscription operation lists all the domain services available under the given subscription (and across all resource groups within that subscription).
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid.

endpoints.name: List Domain Services in Resource Group (GET Resources)
endpoints.description: The List Domain Services in Resource Group operation lists all the domain services available under the given resource group.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname.

endpoints.name: Get Domain Service (GET Resources)
endpoints.description: The Get Domain Service operation retrieves a json representation of the Domain Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DOMAINSERVICENAME}} with a real domainservicename.

endpoints.name: Create or Update Domain Service (PUT Resource)
endpoints.description: The Create Domain Service operation creates a new domain service with the specified parameters. If the specific service already exists, then any patchable properties will be updated and any immutable properties will remain unchanged.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DOMAINSERVICENAME}} with a real domainservicename.

endpoints.name: Delete Domain Service (DELETE Resource)
endpoints.description: The Delete Domain Service operation deletes an existing Domain Service.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DOMAINSERVICENAME}} with a real domainservicename.

endpoints.name: Update Domain Service (PATCH Resource)
endpoints.description: The Update Domain Service operation can be used to update the existing deployment. The update call only supports the properties listed in the PATCH body.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{SUBSCRIPTIONID}} with a real subscriptionid. Replace {{RESOURCEGROUPNAME}} with a real resourcegroupname. Replace {{DOMAINSERVICENAME}} with a real domainservicename.
